label: Portal swirls fill full viewport — fade radius + Lissajous amplitude increased
notes: Two changes to push portals to frame edges: (1) fade smoothstep 0.65→1.30 so each portal extends to full frame diagonal. (2) Lissajous amplitudes roughly doubled (~0.20→0.38 x, ~0.22→0.52 y) so centers drift across more of the portrait frame. Y amplitude larger than X to match portrait aspect ratio.
